title: Tool-Specific Post-Install Hooks
description: Add default post-install hooks for tools that require additional configuration after installation, such as shell integration, PATH setup, or configuration file generation
acceptance_criteria: Tools with shell integration (nvm, rustup, pyenv) have hooks to update shell rc
Tools needing PATH updates have hooks to configure PATH
Tools requiring config files have hooks to generate defaults
Hooks are optional and can be disabled per-tool
Hooks integrate with existing PRD-003 hooks system
Hooks integrate with PRD-008 env vars for PATH management

tasks.title: Define default hooks data structure
tasks.description: Create a system for tools to define their default post-install hooks
subtasks: Add post_install_hook field to ToolSpec struct
Support inline script strings and script file references
Add hook_description for user-facing messages
Support conditional hooks (e.g., only on first install)

tasks.title: Add hooks for shell integration tools
tasks.description: Add default hooks for tools that need shell rc updates
subtasks: starship: Add hook to add shell init to shell rc
zoxide: Add hook to add zoxide init to shell rc
direnv: Add hook to add direnv hook to shell rc
fzf: Add hook to source fzf keybindings and completion

tasks.title: Add hooks for PATH configuration tools
tasks.description: Add default hooks for tools needing PATH setup
subtasks: go: Add GOPATH and GOBIN to PATH
dotnet: Add .dotnet/tools to PATH

tasks.title: Add hooks for config file generation
tasks.description: Add default hooks for tools that benefit from default configs
subtasks: git: Set sensible defaults (defaultBranch, autocrlf, rebase)
kubectl: Add shell completion and 'k' alias
terraform: Install shell autocomplete

tasks.title: Integrate with setup flow
tasks.description: Execute default hooks during jarvy setup
subtasks: Check for tool-specific default hooks after install
Respect --no-hooks flag for default hooks too
Show which default hooks will run in dry-run
User hooks take precedence over default hooks

tasks.title: Add CLI flag to list default hooks
tasks.description: Add command to show what default hooks each tool has
subtasks: Add jarvy tools --default-hooks flag to show hooks
Show hook description and script content
Support JSON, YAML, TOML, and pretty output formats

tasks.title: Write tests
tasks.description: Create tests for default hooks functionality
subtasks: Test default hook fallback when no user hook defined
Test user hook takes precedence over default hook
Test --no-hooks disables default hooks
Test default hook visibility in dry-run mode
Test --default-hooks CLI flag outputs

tasks.title: Update documentation
subtasks: Document default hooks concept in CLAUDE.md
Add example tool with default hook
Document CLI flag for listing default hooks

implementation_notes.hook_execution: Default hooks run only when no user-defined hooks.{tool}.post_install exists
implementation_notes.shell_detection: Uses idempotent shell scripts that check before modifying files
implementation_notes.idempotency: All hooks check for existing config before modifying (grep before append)
implementation_notes.feedback: Hooks show clear messages about what they configure
implementation_notes.error_handling: Default hook failures are warnings, not errors - setup continues

tools_with_default_hooks.description: Add starship shell initialization to .bashrc and .zshrc
Add zoxide shell initialization to .bashrc and .zshrc
Add direnv shell hook to .bashrc and .zshrc
Configure fzf shell integration (keybindings and completions)
Configure GOPATH and add Go binaries to PATH
Configure DOTNET_ROOT and add .NET tools to PATH
Configure sensible Git defaults (defaultBranch=main, autocrlf, rebase)
Enable kubectl shell completion and 'k' alias

risks.description: Hooks could conflict with user's existing configuration
risks.mitigation: Check for existing config before modifying (grep before append)

risks.description: Shell rc modifications could break user's shell
risks.mitigation: All modifications are additive and idempotent

risks.description: Hooks running unexpectedly could surprise users
risks.mitigation: Clear messaging about what hooks run, --no-hooks disables all, user hooks take precedence
